name: buvo-pos
description: BUVO POS retail counter and stock management app.
author: BUVO

scripts.desktop:dev: concurrently -k "npm run api" "npm run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 http://127.0.0.1:8787/api/health && BUVO_ELECTRON_RENDERER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron ."
scripts.desktop:dist: npm run build && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder && npm run rebuild:node-native
scripts.desktop:dist:mac: npm run build && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac && npm run rebuild:node-native
scripts.desktop:dist:win: npm run build && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win nsis --x64 && npm run rebuild:node-native
scripts.desktop:dist:linux: npm run build && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --linux AppImage --x64 && npm run rebuild:node-native
scripts.desktop:pack: npm run build && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --dir && npm run rebuild:node-native
scripts.build: tsc -b && vite build && npm run build:server
